name: an Edit introducing an app-code violation is denied before write (reconstruction + full-stack rules)
command:
printf 'const y: number = 1;
' > app.ts && printf '%s' '{"tool_name":"Edit","tool_input":{"file_path":"app.ts","old_string":"number","new_string":"any"}}' | bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-pre-write.sh" 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'g-ts-001' e.txt && echo edit-app-violation-denied 1>&2
